sections.label: Section 3.2.504
sections.translation: O most fortunate Antipho !

sections.label: Section 3.2.504b
sections.translation: What , I ?

sections.label: Section 3.2.504c
sections.translation: To have in your possession the object of your love ,

sections.label: Section 3.2.505
sections.original: Nec cum huiusmodi unquam usus venit ut conflictares malo .
sections.translation: and have no occasion to encounter such a nuisance as this .

sections.label: Section 3.2.506
sections.original: Mihin domi est ? immo , id quod aiunt , auribus teneo lupum .
sections.translation: What I , in my possession ? Why yes , as the saying is , I ’ ve got a wolf by the ears ; [*] for I neither know how to get rid of her , nor yet how to keep her .

sections.label: Section 3.2.508
sections.original: Ipsum istuc mihi in hoc est .
sections.translation: That ’ s just my case with regard to him ( pointing to PHAEDRIA ) .

sections.label: Section 3.2.508b
sections.translation: Aye , aye , don ’ t you show too little of the Procurer . ( To PHAEDRIA .) What has he been doing ?

sections.label: Section 3.2.509b
sections.translation: What , he ? Acting the part of a most inhuman fellow ;

sections.label: Section 3.2.510
sections.translation: been and sold my Pamphila .

sections.label: Section 3.2.510b
sections.translation: What ! Sold her ?

sections.label: Section 3.2.510c
sections.translation: Sold her , say you ?

sections.label: Section 3.2.511
sections.translation: Sold her .

sections.label: Section 3.2.511b
sections.original: Quam indignum facinus , ancillam aere emtam suo !
sections.translation: What a shocking crime — a wench bought with one ’ s own money !

sections.label: Section 3.2.512
sections.original: Nequeo exorare ut me maneat , et cum illo ut mutet fidem ,
sections.translation: I can not prevail upon him to wait for me the next three days , and so far break off the bargain with the person , while I get the money from my friends , which has been promised me ; if I don ’ t give it him then , let him not wait a single hour longer .

sections.label: Section 3.2.515
sections.translation: Very good .

sections.label: Section 3.2.515b
sections.original: Haud longum est id quod orat , Dorio : exoret sine :
sections.translation: It ’ s not a long time that he asks , Dorio ; do let him prevail upon you ; he ’ ll pay you two-fold for having acted to him thus obligingly .

sections.label: Section 3.2.517
sections.translation: Mere words !

sections.label: Section 3.2.517b
sections.translation: Will you allow Pamphila to be carried away from this place ? And then , besides , can you possibly allow their love to be severed asunder ?

sections.label: Section 3.2.519
sections.translation: Neither I nor you cause that .

sections.label: Section 3.2.519b
sections.original: Di tibi omnes id quod es dignus duint .
sections.translation: May all the Gods grant you what you are deserving of !

sections.label: Section 3.2.520
sections.original: Ego te complures adversum ingenium meum menses tuli
sections.translation: I have borne with you for several months quite against my inclination ; promising and whimpering , and yet bringing nothing ; now , on the other hand , I have found one to pay , and not be sniveling ; give place to your betters .

sections.label: Section 3.2.523
sections.original: Certe hercle , ego si satis commemini , tibi quidem est olim dies
sections.translation: I ’ faith , there surely was a day named , if I remember right , for you to pay him .

sections.label: Section 3.2.524b
sections.translation: It is the fact .

sections.label: Section 3.2.524c
sections.translation: Do I deny it ?

sections.label: Section 3.2.525
sections.translation: Is that day past , then ?

sections.label: Section 3.2.525b
sections.translation: No ; but this one has come before it .

sections.label: Section 3.2.525c
sections.translation: Are you not ashamed of your perfidy ?

sections.label: Section 3.2.526b
sections.translation: Not at all , so long as it is for my interest .

sections.label: Section 3.2.526c
sections.translation: Dunghill !

sections.label: Section 3.2.526d
sections.translation: Dorio , is it right , pray , for you to act thus ?

sections.label: Section 3.2.527b
sections.translation: It is my way ; if I suit you , make use of me .

sections.label: Section 3.2.528
sections.translation: Do you try to trifle with him ( pointing to PHAEDRIA ) in this manner ?

sections.label: Section 3.2.528b
sections.original: Immo enimvero , Antipho , hic me decipit :
sections.translation: Why really , on the contrary , Antipho , it ’ s he trifling with me , for he knew me to be a person of this sort ; I supposed him to be quite a different man ;

sections.label: Section 3.2.530
sections.original: Iste me fefellit ; ego isti nihilo sum aliter ac fui .
sections.translation: he has deceived me ; I ’ m not a bit different to him from what I was before . But however that may be , I ’ ll yet do this ; the captain has said , that to-morrow morning he will pay me the money ; if you bring it me before that , Phaedria , I ’ ll follow my rule , that he is the first served who is the first to pay . Farewell ! ( Goes into his house .)

sections.label: Section 3.3.534
sections.original: Quid faciam ? Unde ego nunc tam subito huic argentum inveniam miser ,
sections.translation: What am I to do ? Wretch that I am ! where am I now in this emergency to raise the money for him ,

sections.label: Section 3.3.535
sections.original: Cui minus nihilo est ? quod si hic potuisset nunc exorarier
sections.translation: I , who am worse than nothing ? If it had been possible for these three days to be obtained of him , it was promised me by then .

sections.label: Section 3.3.536b
sections.translation: Geta , shall we suffer him to continue thus wretched , when he so lately assisted me in the kind way you were mentioning ? On the contrary , why not , as there ’ s need of it try to do him a kindness in return ?

sections.label: Section 3.3.539
sections.translation: For my part , I ’ m sure it is but fair .

sections.label: Section 3.3.539b
sections.original: Age ergo , solus servare hunc potes .
sections.translation: Come then , you are the only man able to serve him .

sections.label: Section 3.3.540
sections.translation: What can I do ?

sections.label: Section 3.3.540b
sections.translation: Procure the money .

sections.label: Section 3.3.540c
sections.translation: I wish I could ; but where it is to come from — tell me that .

sections.label: Section 3.3.541
sections.translation: My father has come home .

sections.label: Section 3.3.541b
sections.translation: I know ; but what of that ?

sections.label: Section 3.3.541c
sections.translation: Oh , a word to the wise [*] is quite enough .

sections.label: Section 3.3.542
sections.translation: Is that it , then ?

sections.label: Section 3.3.542b
sections.translation: Just so .

sections.label: Section 3.3.542c
sections.original: Sane hercle pulchre suades : etiam tu hinc abis ?
sections.translation: Upon my faith , you really do give me fine advice ; out upon you ! Ought I not to be heartily glad , if I meet with no mishap through your marriage , but what , in addition to that , you must now bid me , for his sake , to be seeking risk upon risk ?

sections.label: Section 3.3.545
sections.translation: ’ Tis true what he says .

sections.label: Section 3.3.545b
sections.original: Quid ? ego vobis , Geta , alienus sum ?
sections.translation: What ! am I a stranger to you , Geta ?

sections.label: Section 3.3.545c
sections.translation: I don ’ t consider you so . But is it so trifling a matter that the old gentleman is now vexed with us all , that we must provoke him still more , and leave no room for entreaty ?

sections.label: Section 3.3.548
sections.original: Alius ab oculis meis illam in ignotum hinc abducet locum ? Hem !
sections.translation: Is another man to take her away from before my eyes to some unknown spot ? Alas !

sections.label: Section 3.3.549
sections.original: Tum igitur dum licet dumque adsum loquimini mecum , Antipho ;
sections.translation: speak to me then , Antipho , and look upon me while you have the opportunity , and while I ’ m present .

sections.label: Section 3.3.550b
sections.original: Quamobrem ? aut quidnam facturus es cedo ?
sections.translation: Why so , or what are you going to do ? Pray , tell me .

sections.label: Section 3.3.551
sections.original: Quoquo hinc asportabitur terrarum certum est persequi ,
sections.translation: To whatever part of the world she is borne away , I ’ m determined to follow her or to perish .

sections.label: Section 3.3.552b
sections.original: Di bene vertant , quod agas ; pedetentim tamen .
sections.translation: May the Gods prosper your design ! Cautiously ’ s the word , however .

sections.label: Section 3.3.553
sections.original: Vide si quid opis potes afferre huic .
sections.translation: Do see if you can give him any assistance at all .

sections.label: Section 3.3.553b
sections.translation: Any at all — how ?

sections.label: Section 3.3.553c
sections.translation: Pray , do try , that he mayn ’ t be doing something that we may afterward be more or less sorry for , Geta .

sections.label: Section 3.3.555
sections.original: Quaero . Salvus est , ut opinor ; verum enim metuo malum .
sections.translation: I ’ m considering , ( He pauses .) He ’ s all safe , so far as I can guess : but still , I ’ m afraid of mischief .
